title: Extend runDoctorCiteCoverage with contract metric + type routing + unresolved bucket + layer breakdown
description: Augment runDoctorCiteCoverage with: (1) drift-gated contract marker emit + independent contract window; (2) idTypeMap-driven cite routing (decisions/pitfalls strict / models reference / guidelines+processes deferred); (3) cite_id_unresolved bucket for hallucinated ids; (4) per-(layer,type) cross-tab breakdown in metrics; (5) operator vs edit_intent_checked diff comparison for hard_violated detection; (6) skip_reason histogram. Highest-complexity task in rc.24 — pressure pass target.

files.change: Pre-step: load idTypeMap via TASK-07 loader. Add contractMarker = await ensureCiteContractPolicyActivatedMarker(projectRoot) — if marker_ts=0 AND blocked_by='bootstrap_drift', set contract_metrics_status='skipped:bootstrap_drift' and skip contract computation. Else compute contractEffectiveSince = max(contractMarker.marker_ts, options.since). For each filtered assistant_turn with index-aligned (cite_ids[i], cite_tags[i], cite_commitments[i]): resolve type via idTypeMap; if !type → bump cite_id_unresolved counter; if type ∈ ['decisions','pitfalls'] → check commitments: empty → contract_missing++; non-empty → run operator vs session edits diff (require fetch session_edits set via existing buildLastActiveIndex pattern); if violation → hard_violated++; if skip_reason → skip_count[reason]++. For type='models' → no contract check (reference cite). For type ∈ ['guidelines','processes'] → no contract check (defer rc.25). Cross-tab by (layer, type) using id prefix (KT-/KP-). Apply --layer filter at metric aggregation.

Test cases: (1) bootstrap drift → contract_metrics_status='skipped:bootstrap_drift', other metrics still computed; (2) decisions cite with valid contract + matching edits → contract_with=1, hard_violated=0; (3) decisions cite with contract but mismatched edits → hard_violated=1; (4) pitfalls cite missing contract → contract_missing=1; (5) models cite → no contract check, no metric bump; (6) guidelines cite → no contract check; (7) unresolved id → cite_id_unresolved=1; (8) skip:sequencing → skip_count.sequencing=1; (9) personal layer cite breakdown — KP-* counted separately; (10) --layer=team filter → KP-* excluded; (11) --layer=personal filter → KT-* excluded; (12) cross-tab (layer,type) breakdown shape; (13) require: operator matched via diff content grep; (14) forbid: operator violation when symbol added; (15) !edit: operator violation when file modified. ≥15 cases.

implementation: Read packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts L5627-L5990 to map current runDoctorCiteCoverage structure.
Add at top: idTypeMap = await loadKbIdTypeMap(projectRoot); contractMarker = await ensureCiteContractPolicyActivatedMarker(projectRoot).
Add contract metric accumulators: contract_with, contract_missing, hard_violated, skip_count (Record), cite_id_unresolved, per_layer_type (Map<layer, Map<type, count>>).
Extend turn loop: for each index i in cite_ids, lookup idTypeMap; route by type; for decisions/pitfalls evaluate commitment vs session edits.

Implement operator-vs-edits comparator: edit:<glob> requires session_edits matches minimatch; !edit:<glob> requires NO match; require:<symbol> requires symbol appears in any session diff content (need diff content from edit_intent_checked event payload); forbid:<symbol> requires NO appearance.

Confirm edit_intent_checked event carries diff content sufficient for require/forbid check; if not, scope require/forbid to '<symbol present in changed file basename>' fallback and document limitation.
Aggregate contract_metrics under new contract_metrics field on CiteCoverageReport (TASK-09 will finalize type).
Add test fixtures + ≥15 cases per files[].change directive.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test doctor` to confirm green.

reference.examples: rc.20 TASK-06 single-pass with 5 metric accumulators; rc.24 adds 5 more (contract_with, contract_missing, hard_violated, skip_count, cite_id_unresolved) plus per_layer_type cross-tab.

rationale.chosen_approach: Single-pass extension of existing replay loop. Reuse minimatch path matching pattern from expected_but_missed logic.
alternatives_considered: Separate runDoctorContractCheck function (rejected: duplicates ledger I/O)
External tool consuming exported metrics (rejected: not in scope)
decision_factors: Code locality — all cite analysis in one function
rationale.tradeoffs: runDoctorCiteCoverage function grows ~300 LoC; mitigated by deferred refactor (rc.25 candidate to extract cite-coverage submodule).

manual_checks: Manual: scaffold project with mix of decisions/pitfalls/models cites + edits, run fab doctor --cite-coverage --json → verify all metrics

criteria: CiteCoverageReport return includes contract_metrics_status + contract_metrics + per_layer_type fields
contract_metrics shape: { decisions_cited, pitfalls_cited, contract_with, contract_missing, hard_violated, skip_count, cite_id_unresolved }
Existing rc.20 metrics (recalled_unverified / qualifying_cites / expected_but_missed) unchanged in behavior
Commit msg: 'feat(rc24): contract metric + type routing + unresolved bucket in runDoctorCiteCoverage (TASK-08)'
